title: KB Plan Researched
description: Emitted by `kb plan-research <id>` when deer-flow research tracks are dispatched for a plan. Enables hearth-loom to correlate bead dispatch with the originating plan. UNCONSUMED (2026-07 zombie-event audit): no consumer was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry. The 'enables hearth-loom' language above describes aspirational/intended use, not a verified handler. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write that may become useful later); flagged so the registry stops implying something reads it today. See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.

track_ids.description: deer-flow thread/track IDs dispatched for this plan

live.description: Whether research was dispatched live (true) or dry-run (false)
